rules.name: task-master-no-reinit
rules.evidence: DO NOT RE-INITIALIZE. That will not do anything beyond re-adding the same Taskmaster core files.

rules.name: no-manual-edit-tasks-json
rules.evidence: Never manually edit `tasks.json` - use commands instead

rules.name: no-manual-edit-taskmaster-config
rules.evidence: Never manually edit `.taskmaster/config.json` - use `task-master models` to modify

rules.name: regenerate-after-tasks-json-edit
rules.evidence: Run `task-master generate` after manual changes to tasks.json

rules.name: no-edit-molecule-generated-code
rules.evidence: Molecule generates code for Molecule Schema. Don't edit the generated code, but use it as a reference. If implementing, do it in other files.

rules.name: molecule-schema-no-duplicate-definitions-edit
rules.evidence: Import shared definitions - DO NOT DUPLICATE

rules.name: molecule-schema-no-duplicate-definitions-write
rules.evidence: Import shared definitions - DO NOT DUPLICATE

rules.name: prd-file-location-naming
rules.evidence: PRD files should be store at docs/project-name.prd.txt

skill_candidates.summary: Standard Development Workflow: initialize Task Master, parse the PRD, analyze complexity and expand tasks, then run the daily loop (next, show, update-subtask, set-status), optionally across multiple Claude Code terminals for parallel work.
skill_candidates.evidence:
# Start each session
task-master next                           # Find next available task
task-master show <id>                     # Review task details

skill_candidates.summary: Iterative Implementation workflow per subtask: review requirements, explore and plan, log the plan, mark in-progress, implement, log progress, then mark done.
skill_candidates.evidence:
1. `task-master show <subtask-id>` - Understand requirements
... 7. `task-master set-status --id=<id> --status=done` - Complete task

skill_candidates.summary: Complex Workflows with Checklists for large migrations: write a migration PRD, parse it with --append, expand the new tasks into subtasks, then work through and log progress systematically.
skill_candidates.evidence:
1. Create a markdown PRD file describing the new changes: `touch task-migration-checklist.md` (prds can be .txt or .md)
2. Use Taskmaster to parse the new prd with `task-master parse-prd --append`

skill_candidates.summary: Mandatory PRD Development Workflow: product design discussion, PRD consolidation, PRD quality review, PRD approval, then PRD-driven development, with coding gated behind formal approval.
skill_candidates.evidence:
Step 1: Product Design Discussion Phase - Collaborative exploration and vision refinement
...
Step 4: PRD Approval - Formal sign-off before any development begins

skill_candidates.summary: Complete PRD Template: build the document as a <context> block (Overview, Core Features, User Experience) followed by a <PRD> block (Technical Architecture, Development Roadmap, Logical Dependency Chain, Risks and Mitigations, Appendix) in that exact order.
skill_candidates.evidence:
Maintain strict separation between `<context>` and `<PRD>` sections
- Follow the exact section order and formatting specified

skill_candidates.summary: CKB dApp development order: visual prototyping first (v0.dev), smart contract/cell data design second, test-driven design third.
skill_candidates.evidence:
Visual Prototyping First: Use v0.dev for visual prototyping and start from the corresponding code downloaded.
    - Use @ckb-ccc/connector-react as the global wallet connector
- Smart Contract Design Second

always_on: Task Master CLI/MCP command reference and .taskmaster/.claude file and directory structure (documentation, not an obligation)
Custom slash command examples (taskmaster-next.md, taskmaster-complete.md) for repeated Task Master workflows
Recommended .claude/settings.json tool allowlist for Task Master (Edit, Bash(task-master *), etc.)
API key configuration requirements (at least one of ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, PERPLEXITY_API_KEY, etc.) and task-master models setup commands
Task ID format and status value reference (pending/in-progress/done/deferred/cancelled/blocked) and the task JSON field schema
Claude Code session-management tips: use /clear between tasks, create custom slash commands, configure the tool allowlist, use headless mode for automation
Multi-task update command guidance (update --from vs update-task vs update-subtask) and the --research flag
Troubleshooting steps for failing AI commands and MCP connection issues
Task markdown files under tasks/ are auto-generated (informational, no explicit prohibition)
PRD-First Development Mandate: no development work begins without a completed, approved PRD, and all technical decisions must trace back to it
PRD anti-patterns to avoid (starting work before approval, incomplete PRDs, undocumented scope changes, timeline estimates in the roadmap, etc.)
PRD naming/location conventions and quality-gate checklist (completeness, stakeholder review, technical sufficiency)
Quest Submission System architecture overview, data flow, and current implementation status

CKB critical type-system guidance: always use Molecule-generated types instead of hand-duplicating them, and the ConnectedTypeID args pattern (type_id + connected_key) for campaign/user cells vs plain type_id for the protocol cell
SSRI architecture explanation: SSRI methods (off-chain, build transactions, no validation) vs Verify methods (on-chain, validate via Recipe pattern) and their file locations
dApp service-layer architecture conventions: dedicated *-cells.ts fetching files, *-service.ts business-logic files, and React context providers for SSRI state
Cell data structure reference (CKBoost Cell Pattern YAML) and the build.rs example for regenerating Molecule code via moleculec, plus using make build to build
Error-handling best practices (shared Error enum, meaningful dApp error messages, ConnectedTypeID validation, graceful handling of missing cells/failed transactions)
Testing strategy guidance (contract tests, integration tests, Molecule roundtrip tests, O(1) lookup verification, edge cases)
Transaction Skeleton/Recipe YAML template for documenting Inputs/Outputs/HeaderDeps/CellDeps/Witnesses

Serverless architecture preference (Netlify + Netlify Functions/Cloudflare Workers, on-chain data as source of truth, local storage/Neon only for optimization) and the typical contracts/dapp/docs folder structure
